seo.title: Shopping guide
seo.description: A complete shopping guide for SmartMall: find products, make payment, and receive your order.

chooseProduct.title: Choose a product
chooseProduct.content: Search for and choose the product you want to buy

login.title: Sign in / Sign up
login.content: Create an account or sign in to continue

payment.title: Payment
payment.content: Choose a payment method and complete your order

delivery.title: Delivery
delivery.content: Track your order and receive your product

bankTransfer.name: Bank transfer
bankTransfer.desc: Fast Internet Banking and Mobile Banking.

search.title: Search for products
search.description: Use the smart search bar at the top of the page or browse clearly organized categories to find the product that fits your needs.

cart.title: Add to cart
cart.description: Choose quantity, color, size, then click 'Add to cart'. You can continue shopping or go to your cart to check out right away.

checkout.title: Review & fill in information
checkout.description: Review the products in your cart. Enter the correct delivery address and phone number so we can serve you better.
checkout.note: Tip: Save your address in your account for faster checkout next time.

smartTips.comparePrice: Compare prices before buying to always make the best choice.
smartTips.returnPolicy: Check the return policy for each product type.
smartTips.checkInfo: Always carefully check product information and buyer reviews first.
smartTips.flashSale: Take advantage of golden-hour flash sale campaigns.
smartTips.coupons: Make the most of available discount codes and accumulated vouchers.

trackOrder.question: How can I track my order?
trackOrder.answer: You can track your order by signing in to your account and opening "My orders", or by using the order code sent via email/SMS.

deliveryTime.question: How long does delivery take?
deliveryTime.answer: The usual delivery time is 2-3 working hours.

returnProduct.question: Can I return or exchange products?
returnProduct.answer: Return and exchange policies depend on each product type. Please check the detailed policy on the product information page.

shippingFee.question: How is the shipping fee calculated?
shippingFee.answer:
- Online delivery products such as software, activation codes, accounts, etc. always have free delivery. Products will be sent by email or message.
- Physical products: Shipping fees are calculated based on region and weight. Orders from 500,000đ and above receive free shipping.

hero.title: Shop easily and safely
hero.description: View the steps for ordering, payment, and order tracking to shop more conveniently on the website.

paymentSection.title: Payment methods
paymentSection.description: Choose the right method to complete your order quickly and safely.
paymentSection.securityNote: All transactions are processed through a secure connection, helping keep your payment information safer.

supportSection.title: Need more help?
supportSection.description: Ready to start shopping? Explore available products and offers on the website.

tipsSection.title: Shop smarter
tipsSection.description: A few small notes to help you choose the right products and place orders more conveniently.
